Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Herp for and with Linda Harrington (Successor Trustee). Douglas Housman on behalf of Carolyn Cain.

Ms. Herp provided an endorsed copy of the proof of service and addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to time spent/fees for Serge being greater than Otis' share, the $23.99 research fee, fees to Mr. Vann, etc. Ms. Herp also stated that they now feel the Court has enough information to determine if Ms. Cain's fees are reasonable and that they withdraw their objection. The Petition to Terminate Trust, etc. and the Petition for Order Authorizing Successor Trustee to Pay Attorney's Fees to Carolyn Cain were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E.Wiss Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order An Authorizing And Directing Linda Harrington As Successor Trustee To Pay Attorneys Fees And Costs To Attorney Carolyn D. Cain

Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Continued To Apr-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Doug Housman for Law Offices of Carolyn Cain. Carrie Moulton for Linda Harrington.

The Petition for Order Authorizing and Directing Linda Harrington to Pay Attorney's Fees, etc. was continued to April 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 (same date as the status hearing on filing of the accounting). The matter will then be continued to the hearing date given to the accounting petition at the time of filing.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carrie Moulton for Linda Harrington (Petitioner).

Ms. Moulton stated that she should have the accounting filed within the next couple of weeks. Status on filing of the accounting was continued to April 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Petition For Authority To Cancel Deed Or To Appoint Petitioner As Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Advanced From Jul-30-13 To May-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Authority To Cancel Deed Or To Appoint Petitioner As Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Cain for and with Linda Harrington. Dennis Vann for Paula Bibbs (Conservator of Serge Bess/Beneficiary of the Trust). Franchesca Callejo Court appointed Counsel for Serge Bess (Conservatee). Ottis Bess was also present.

Ms. Cain explained that there were two deeds executed, the first one executed on August 16, 1994 and the second one on August 27, 1996, that there is no 1996 Trust, stated that nobody knows about the second deed and that no one is objecting. Ms. Cain presented a proposed order in open Court. Ms. Callejo, Mr. Vann and Mr. Bess all stated that they do not object to the form of order. The Court granted the Petition for Authority to Cancel Deed or to Appoint Petitioner as Successor Trustee (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Shortening Time And Advancing Hearing.
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (681 Page Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Feb-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Paula Bibbs (Conservator for Serg Bess). Carolynn Cain for and with Linda Harrington (Trustee). Serg Bess also present. Otis Bess also present.

The sale was confirmed at $1,460,000.00 to Alex Varum on behalf of Lenny Semis and Gary Varum based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required at this time. Funds are to be distributed to the Conservatorship directly out of escrow and bond will be increased in the Conservatorship matter.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
